question: What does the largest colored area represent in the last period?

options.A: The green area (Segment C) represents the dominant share.
options.B: The orange area (Segment A) indicates the highest share.
options.C: The red area (Segment C) shows the largest share.
options.D: Cannot determine what the largest segment represents without a legend to explain the color coding.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
